title: Halfway's Modpack
description: This is a modpack that houses all the immersive and cinematic mods that I use in my videos.
body:
# **The Extensive Mod List In Halfway Gaming's Videos on the Better Basics Server**

This Modpack contains around 22 mods, all of which are supposed to add to the immersion of normal Minecraft, for a much more cinematic experience. Some mods enable shaders to be used and others increase the render distance by up to 500 chunchs (Yes Distant Horizons), but in the end this is to make YouTube videos so there will also be a few mods to help record gameplay (Repaly Mod/Flashback). 

In the end its exactly what you have already seen in my videos, and is really easy to customise with the installed 'Mod Menu'. 

Hope you enjoy!!


**IMPORTANT:**
This modpack is for Fabric only, and for versions 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.21.5
